title: FLOSS Weekly 409: ChickTech
summary:
ChickTech is dedicated to retaining women in the technology workforce and increasing the number of women and girls pursuing technology-based careers. ChickTech sets up hands-on technology-centric events to empower, support, and increase the confidence of women and girls. Through the events, ChickTech builds community, empowers participants to see themselves as leaders and provides networking and mentoring opportunities in the rapidly growing high-tech industry.

Download or subscribe to this show at https://twit.tv/shows/floss-weekly<… href="http://bit.ly/flossweeklyguests" target="_blank">Here's what's coming up for FLOSS in the future.

Think your open source project should be on FLOSS Weekly? Email Randal at merlyn@stonehenge.com
